action_items.task: Research on speech recognition feature for the remote control
Design a compact, bright, colorful, trendy, and strong remote control
Design a remote control with an on-off button and channel lock
Design a remote control with an alarm-clock feature
Design a remote control with non-allergic material
Design a remote control with an electric saving feature
Design a remote control with a timer feature
Design a remote control with a child lock feature
Design a remote control with a beep feature
Design a remote control with lid buttons

Consider adding a rubber grip to the remote control for improved ergonomics
Investigate the possibility of a brighter color for the remote control to make it easier to find
Research the feasibility and cost of adding voice response to the remote control
Consider offering multiple color options for the remote control
Explore the potential of a more bio-morphic form in the articulation for increased sales
Conduct market research to gauge the impact of additional features on sales
